title: Physical edges
description: Schema for shared/physical_edges.csv. Physical edges describe optional grouping/navigation relationships between navigation clusters in shared/physical_system_nodes.csv. Edges are navigation metadata only and must not encode coverage obligations or carrier flows between role-shaped objects; the canonical role topology lives in roles.csv and role_decomposition_edges.csv.

edge_kind.description: Navigation relationship kind. Only navigation grouping is allowed; carrier-flow and host-service edge kinds are not part of the canonical ontology.

display_order.description: Stable ordering for navigation and documentation.
